description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery is a textured brown fabric with a subtle woven pattern, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and fully upholstered, aligning with the backrest for a cohesive look. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs that are slightly angled outward, providing stability and a contemporary touch. Overall, the design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with brown textured fabric upholstery, straight armrests, and slim black metal legs. Features two large seat and back cushions for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, fully upholstered armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, highlighting the armrest and cushion depth from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, fully upholstered backrest and the slim black legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, medium-height armrests fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the sofa, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured woven fabric in a solid brown color, with a subtle, uniform pattern and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
